title: Add local smoke scripts and runbook
verify: Smoke script checks database, backend, and storefront local readiness.
Runbook explains setup, start, smoke, stop, port conflicts, and local-only reset behavior.
Local setup evidence is stored under .tasks/TASK-004/ during execution.
evidence_required: Runbook link and Memory Bank lint output.
constraints: Smoke checks must be local and repeatable.
Runbook must not require production secrets.
Destructive local reset steps must be explicit, not the default stop path.
invariants: No production secrets or live payment mutation may be used as proof.
Memory Bank must be synchronized after meaningful changes.
purpose: Make the local foundation repeatably verifiable by developers and later agents.
success_outcome: A developer can follow the runbook and run one local smoke command that verifies the Compose stack is usable.
anti_goals: Do not make smoke checks depend on live providers.
Do not use destructive data reset as the default verification path.
Do not mark the feature complete without local stack evidence.

forbidden_scope: production deploy instructions as an implemented target
stop_conditions: Smoke checks cannot verify all required local services.
Runbook requires production secrets or live provider credentials.
Verification would delete local data without explicit operator action.
